name: Tammy Simonetti
body: Hi Lyla! I’m Tammy, your grandma’s cousin. I’m praying for you and so is my husband , my children, and my grandchildren . 🙏🏻❤️🙏🏻❤️

name: Lana Lane
body: Hey sweet girl!! Aunt Lana and Uncle Doug love you very much! You are such a strong girl and you glow with the love of Jesus!!! Lots of people are praying for you in Kansas!!!

name: Kathy Laub
body: Lyla's strength, faith and patience ( and that of your whole family) have inspired us! Many prayers lifted up for you all every day. 🙏 🙏🙏(Kathy Laub from Newville Church)

name: Cathy Meals
body: Good morning Lyla! We’re all praying for you here in Carlisle Pa and love you very much! We know that God will make you better😘🙏❤️

name: Matt Henry
body: I’m putting this on my calendar and will share this with my church prayer page!
